name: beagle-kiosk
description: Open-source Electron gaming kiosk for Beagle OS
author: Beagle OS contributors

scripts.lint: node --check main.js && node --check preload.js && node --check renderer/kiosk.js && node --check scripts/write-release-manifest.js && python3 -m py_compile update_catalog.py

buildHeader: Beagle OS Gaming Kiosk - MIT Licensed
